$schema: Suppression file for hook-ecosystem-audit false positives

suppressions.reason: Pattern /^\s*(?:[A-Z]{2,}\s+){2,}[A-Z]{2,}/ uses disjoint character classes ([A-Z] vs \s) — no ReDoS risk despite nested quantifiers
